Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals, shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, an optional overlay, and a preview Studium Crafters workflow. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters workflow polish:
- Shows the Crafters window as The Studium v0.1.151 - Crafters.
- Changes unavailable FC chest material rows to say Open FC Chest.
- Marks fully withdrawn material rows as Transferred after FC chest withdrawal.
